dict.string: dino uses your location to match the sky to the weather around you and show support resources nearby.
dino uses motion for a gentle parallax in the ambient background.
dino uses the microphone to record your voice journal and turn it into words.
dino transcribes your spoken journal into text so you can keep it as a written reflection.
dino uses the camera so you can capture your finished mirror of affirmations.
dino saves your mirror photo to your camera roll so you can keep the memory.
dino uses your calendar to find free moments for you to breathe and recharge.
dino uses your calendar to find free moments for you to breathe and recharge.
dino adds a gentle break to your calendar when you want one.
dino reads your sleep and steps to understand how rest and movement shape your emotional patterns, so it can help you prepare for harder days.
dino never writes health data. apple requires this description for any app with healthkit access.
